# polytomic_role (Data Source)

Look up a role by name



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Role name (case-insensitive)
- `organization` (String) Organization ID

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Role ID
